categories.name: Events that trigger an insurance claim

fun_fact: Most of us are familiar with Life and Health insurance, but have you heard of Heat Insurance? While you might not need it for an office job, it is becoming a critical safety net for millions of outdoor workers—from construction crews to street vendors. In extreme heat, working isn't just uncomfortable; it's life-threatening. Heat insurance acts as a financial buffer: if the temperature hits a specific "trigger" (like 45°C for three consecutive days), the policy automatically pays out cash to the worker. See this video
